name: Chaos Distill
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>錬</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>金</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>釜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－カオス・ディスティル
desc:
While this card is face-up on the field, any card sent to your GY is banished instead. You can activate 1 of these effects;
● Add 1 "Macro Cosmos", or 1 card that mentions it, from your Deck to your hand, except "Chaos Distill".
● If "Macro Cosmos" is on the field: Banish this face-up card from the Spell & Trap Zone; add 1 LIGHT monster with ? ATK from your Deck to your hand.
You can only use this effect of "Chaos Distill" once per turn.

banished: Banishes cards that would be sent to the Graveyard
